---
title: "EDA 1: Exploring Variables"
format: pdf
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(arrow)
library(ggthemes)

data <- read_parquet("../data/clean_data.parquet")
```

```{r}
glimpse(data[1:23])
```

```{r}
data %>%
  select(agep) %>% 
  ggplot() +
    geom_histogram(aes(x = agep),
                   color = "white",
                   fill = "black") +
    theme_few()
```

```{r}
data %>%
  select(race, grpip) %>%
  ggplot() +
    geom_boxplot(aes(x = grpip,
                     y = reorder(race, grpip))) +
    theme_few()
```

```{r}
data %>%
  select(race, dis) %>%
  filter(!c(race %in% c("Native Alaskan", "Native Hawaiin or Pacific Islander"))) %>% 
  ggplot() +
    geom_bar(aes(x = dis, fill = race), position = "stack")
```
